cases.memory_kind: v2(n+1) is reported only as a local suffix statistic; the true EC17 controller memory requires the public-payload decoder
v2(n+1) is a local suffix statistic, not the full zero-lift canonical-address state
v2(n+1) is a local suffix statistic, not the full maximal outward-code canonical-address state

definitions.block_entropy_bits: plug-in entropy of exact overlapping k-bit word counts
definitions.incremental_block_entropy: H_k-H_(k-1) using each active finite string's overlapping counts; an entropy-rate diagnostic, not a source theorem

scope: exact finite one- and two-bit counts on every row, exact counts through four bits at marked boundaries, and floating entropy renderings; empirical balance/complexity diagnostics only
warning: balanced block frequencies measure local syntactic capacity, not certified future controller memory or mutual information with a future opcode
